_description: Vendored dependency manifest. Per spec §NFR-V2-VEND-1. Populated when happy-dom bundle is first produced. Refresh via scripts/verify-vendor.sh.

happy-dom.min_version_rationale: happy-dom 15.x resolves GH issues #312 (composed event bubbling), #394/#659/#1113 (MutationObserver), #1529 (event target null after stopPropagation), #1766 (Lit event handling). See spec §NFR-V2-SAFETY-4.
known_fidelity_gaps: getComputedStyle(el, pseudoElt).content: ignores pseudoElt arg (GH #1773) — requires harness stub (NFR-V2-SAFETY-3)
document.visibilityState: static 'visible' (accepted caveat — AppleScript only injects into focused tabs)
